review_title: Social-Media Growth made easy
author: Philip F.
pros: It is so easy to schedule and compose new posts in a thoughtful way that it is amazing. It is at least as good as Hootsuite in my opinion and much cheaper. The support answers within minutes and the developer is incredibly caring and friendly. I believe that this product will develop even a lot more!
cons: Difficult to say, because for now they have all I need. Some stuff would be cool to see in the future, like reposting instagram posts directly via URL or further development of the post composing features. But they already have these things on the Roadmap (which is quite well updated)!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very nice affordable social media management software!
description: My overall experience has been good! I love Feedhive and the features that it has to offer, and I see a lot of potential for it in the future!
author: Johnny L.
pros: I love just about everything that Feedhive has to offer. I have the ability to view the analytics of OperationSTART's social media channels and see how they're doing, collaborate with my team on social media posts, be able to generate inspiration and hashtags utilizing the AI aspect of Feedhive, and so much more!
cons: One thing that I wish that Feedhive had that I miss when I was using Zoho Social is a way to view the Twitter Timeline within the software. I also wish that Feedhive had a mobile app because as a student, I'm usually on the go, but I do see that an iOS app is in the works.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: You cant post all video formats in all social media sites.
description: Customer Support is really slow, they took sometimes 2 weeks to reply, i didn't have a proper trial because they delayed 2 weeks to setup my Protonmail account, they also considered my request to post normal Youtube videos a special request, and stopped replying without any refund.
author: Eduardo R.
pros: you can post short form content to different social media sites, you can still schedule and do what other sites like One up do, but it seems they are just starting, there are some bugs as well.
cons: you cannot post longform content like Youtube videos, or Instagram and your videos will be double compressed where if you care about music and video quality might be compromised.

review_title: My go-to, feature rich, frequently updated, social scheduler.
description: FeedHive makes scheduling social posts easy. The approval workflow is brilliant for clients to be able to approve/make edits to posts ahead of time before they go live. The social inbox allows you to reply to comments from all social platforms without leaving FeedHive. The content schedule (weekly/monthly) makes it easy for you (and clients) to see what is planned and for when. Posts can also be added and approved from the calendar.
author: Charlie T.
pros: The UI is user-friendly, and it's easy to start using FeedHive within minutes. Workspaces can be used to manage seperate businesses/clients. It's super easy to connect social accounts. It's easy to create posts and a breeze to schedule them. Drafts are auto-saved, so there's no chance of losing your work. Posts can be assigned a label/category. These labels/categories can be added to your calendar schedule to auto-post at certain times/days. This makes regular posting of your content buckets quick and simple. Posts can also be manually scheduled. Variants of your post can be created for different socials. This makes it easy to make small changes to your post rather than recreate the entire post for each social channel. An example of how I use this is once I've finished writing a post I'll make a variant for Facebook and remove the hashtags. I may also use differently sized images for each social networks. You can also save written templates and there's also a library of AI-generated templates to get inspiration from, as well as a (recently improved) AI hashtag generator. Analytics are presented beautifully and are easy to read.
cons: As I write this you are unable to post to Google My Business, but it's on the roadmap and is being worked on. I can't think of anything I am unhappy with to be completely honest.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: FeedHive: A Social Media Management Must Have
description: I have had a great experience, overall it’s been a fun tool to use for social media management. I love that they have FeedHive University, this allows any user to learn about new features and, it’s perfect for new users!
author: Kevin T.
pros: Even as a new user, it’s easy to navigate. Which cuts down on your setup time and speeds up your time to get things done! ****FeedHive allows you to post directly to Instagram without having to download an app*** Total game changer.
cons: Currently, FeedHive offers the most common social media platforms with many coming soon. Being that I’m a small business owner, I look forward to the Google My Business implementation.

review_title: Feedhive is the up and coming SMM tool, all one would need!
description: My experience with Feedhive has been nothing but pleasant, the team behind the product is very ambitious and the founder is always available to troubleshoot any issues any user incurs. Also, as a cherry on the cake, it is the only SMM tool with a Dark mode, for the people who work at night- it's a blessing.
author: Sarang G.
pros: The absolute thoughtful presence of features and a great amount of detail are given to the User Experience. It's so simple that even boomers don't need a manual. Feedhive complements existing workflows and integrates with tools like Canva, Unsplash and Brandbird- essentially no learning curve.
cons: There isn't much to dislike but I'm impatient for the team to deliver whatever is in the roadmap and even further. I think the support inside the app can be improved.

review_title: FeedHive is the social media tool for startup brands that gave up on Hootsuite but not social media
description: Feedhive is delightful and easy to use. A.I. figures out your posting schedule for you based on your inputs if you want to use it, feedhive A.I. suggestions are also great for getting content ideas if you need them. It is a tool that also feels like a cheerleader motivating you to make sure your social media calendar stays full.
author: Joshua V.
pros: What I like, no LOVE most about Feedhive is it's built for solopreneurs, startup brands, and any entrepreneur that can't be fussed to master or spend time in cumbersome social media tools like Hootsuite. I've tried many social media tools, but gave up on all of them because it felt like you needed to have influencer level aspirations to make using them effective. Feedhive understands our situation, and has made it as easy as possible for startup brands to spread their message, and grow their audience, without needing to become social media masters via their unique A.I. technology.
cons: What I like least about Feedhive is right now there is no youtube integration. However, it is on the roadmap so in time I believe they will include youtube as well.
author_profession: Email copywriter & Soap Opera Sequence Expert
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One of the best social media tool that I have ever used!
description: I have been using socialbee before and after the switch, I was just amazed at how easier the workflow is and the UI was so much better for the eyes together with dark mode!
author: Kamil N.
pros: One of the best things about Feedhive is how intuitive it is. The interface is amazing and creates an easy workflow for all the integrated features.
cons: I am still missing some features that are present with competitors, but the roadmap looks good.

review_title: Definitely Recommend this Software
description: My favorite scheduling software to date.
author: Gregory G.
pros: Steadily adding new features. If it's missing something another platform has, it's not far behind.
cons: Some features are missing, but like I said before, the features are on the way.

review_title: FeedHive is the Later.com Killer
description: This tool has replaced my Later.com subscription. It is easy to use and helps me schedule a ton so I have more time to do other things. It is consistently getting better with more tools and features and updates. I can see the service being one of the best go-to solutions for social media in the near future.
author: Alberto M.
pros: Ease of use to make posts and drag them on the calendar.
cons: Not being able to drag media onto the calendar like Later. It's a minor inconvenience. However, you have to make the post first then you are able to drag and drop it to your liking.

review_title: Scheduler focused
description: I like I can schedule and automate tasks after the posts are scheduled. Also it helps me stay organized.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Focused on the scheduler and client workflow, they are taking the road I was looking for in this kind of tool
cons: Loading times between modules (at least the first load)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Feedhive replaces more and more the big player of social media planning tools!
description: I've been working in social media since 2013 and have been able to use, try and test many different tools (Hootsuite, Falcon.IO, FaceLift, SocialBee, Publer). So far, none of them has pleased me as much as FeedHive. The content area for writing and planning individual posts is clearly laid out and the various tags allow me to quickly understand what kind of content is best received. The hashtag generator is also helpful to not always use the same hashtags. My favorite here is to write two posts for different networks at the same time. (We post only in English on one platform and only in German on the other). The new media gallery and recycled posts make it easy to post even when there is less time for content creation. The monthly and weekly view of scheduled posts is clear and love to schedule the different content types as a fixed date in the calendar so that the individual posts automatically go online on the specified days. The analytics are also clear and don't give a detailed overview, but you can quickly see preferences and figure out if the strategy is working or not. All in all, I would recommend FeedHive at any time, also because the team is very committed to interacting with users and asking them about needed features. I think we can expect many more great things like the app. The basic framework is more than adequate and with every new social network that is integrated, Feedhive replaces more and more the "big player" of social media planning tools!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Content area for writing and planning individual posts is clearly laid out. Tags allow to quickly understand what kind of content is best received. The hashtag generator is very helpful. The new media gallery and recycled posts make it easy to post even when there is less time for content creation. The monthly and weekly view of scheduled posts is well structured.
cons: The analytics are also clear and don't give a detailed overview

review_title: Excellent Tool for AI Content Generation
author: Shivam S.
pros: This program is a gig - it automatically create contents for social media posting. In addition, it plan and schedule content delivery and choose when there are a lot of audience online.
cons: Business plan is a bit expensive, but the results are tremendous - I can’t complain.

review_title: Made me want to get social again
description: Just really intuitive and simple to use. Makes posting across multiple platforms fun, quick and easy.
author: Olly K.
pros: Great design - easy to use and to set up.
cons: Needs some things added but they have that in hand. It's already had things added I needed so more than happy.

review_title: An indispensable tool for every social media ninja
author: Adrian S.
pros: Easy to use, clear UI, very nice, reliable
cons: Google my business and tiktok are missing, but they are listed as coming in the near future

review_title: Very impressive social media management startup
description: I love it. I wanted something like HootSuite without all the chaos (or the high price) I definitely feel like I've gotten incredible value from my AppSumo deal.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The software was built with the end-user in mind. The UI/UX is very easy to navigate and is enjoyable to use.
cons: I wish it was a little easier to recycle old posts. It seems a bit convoluted compared to other solutions like Buffer which are designed specifically with recycling posts in mind.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: my HighFive to FeedHive
description: We are represented with many different brands in many different social networks. FeedHive helps us to keep all channels up to date.
author: Daniel H.
pros: A great software that already offers great functions shortly after the start.
cons: Unfortunately, critical networks like Google My Business are still missing

review_title: Great for non-social media savvy people like me
author: Madhav B.
pros: 1. Easy UI 2. Auto-comment after a post is published 3. AI-generated social post ideas
cons: 1. Analytics needs improvement 2. Mobile optimised experience

review_title: A great social media scheduling system
description: Using FeedHive has helped me to manage multiple brands and social media channels with ease. Their roadmap is even more promising for features they're still rolling out.
author: Rj K.
pros: The UI is very intuitive and easy to use. It's got a lot of great features I haven't seen in other schedulers.
cons: There's a limit on upload size that I think still needs to be bumped up.

review_title: Great product
description: Great experience overall!
author: Catalin P.
pros: I like how intuitive FeedHive is. The application is neat and easy to use. Also, the shareable draft feature is a game-changer and super useful. I am mainly using it to post on LinkedIn and Twitter. I can say I am happy with the tool.
cons: So far, I don't dislike anything about the product. It works great for what I need.

review_title: Best features for the money, hands down
description: It's the responsiveness to feedback that makes me such a fan. They take customer input to heart and really 'get' the kinds of problems and pain we are trying to solve.
author: Thomas K.
pros: I've been using thissince the pre-release days, and [SENSITIVE CONTENT] keeps exceeding expectations. The team they have assembled is always shipping updates and it's like they are reading my mind. The tool is richly featured and yet not overly-complex to use. A huge time-saver.
cons: Previewing posts was a bit iffy in the early days, but it is much improved.

review_title: Great Social Media Management Platform
description: It's been great. I highly recommend it.
author: Jamie R.
pros: The UI/UX - it's clean and easy to use. No bloat or confusion. Definitely saves time and reduces the onboarding time.
cons: Simply that they don't support Tiktok yet. Also their AI isn't the best, but I'm sure that'll improve in time.

review_title: Excellent alternative to some of the more expensive products on the market
description: I've tried lots of schedulers at various price points, and FeedHive is excellent value. I would highly recommend checking them out.
author: Youna A.
pros: I love the clean dashboard and interface. Makes it easy to schedule and preview posts before hitting publish. I also love the hashtag generator, as it makes it easy to add relevant hastags.
cons: I haven't found any drawbacks yet...these guys seem to be constantly improving.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Amazing Product
description: Amazing Software! I have recommended this to so many people already and they are loving it as well. So easy to schedule socials and reuse old ones. Super easy to manage client socials and organise VAs with their own login. Can't wait to see what's next!
author: Danni G.
pros: Ease of setup Amount of socials to post to team logins ability to change the content of a post depending on where you are posting to (love this)
cons: Would like to see an option to preview of the instagram social squares on the main page :)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best Customer Service
description: FeedHive always creates great content with their powerful AI tool. I love to schedule out a few weeks ahead of time and FeedHive does just that for me. I yet have to try to post to my (very inactive) Facebook group. I’m sure once I come up with a plan for this abandoned group, FeedHive will help me tremendously in getting that group going again. I can’t wait for GMB and Pinterest Integration. Overall FeedHive is the perfect social media marketing tool.
author: Andrea K.
pros: Scheduling features Reuse of content Best times of scheduling Predictive Performance Score Great Ai tool Instagram grid preview feature
cons: FeedHive managed to turn my only Con into a Pro: When I first joined FeedHive I wasn’t able to schedule posts to my social media. It seemed to be an un-fixable problem at the time, but together we figured it out. FeedHive has a very dedicated Customer Service and they are super involved in their FacebookCommunity group.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
